name: pdd-monkeytype
description: PDD recreation of a monkeytype-like typing platform: protocols sovereign, implementation replaceable.

scripts.pdd:loop: npm run validate:structural && npm run validate:behavioral && npm run validate:operational && npm run validate:ui -- --boot-candidate && npm run evidence:build && npm run evidence:verify
scripts.test:mutation: echo 'mutation sanity runs inside validate:behavioral (mutationSanity checks)'
